mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat ( name, type, avatar, creator_id, creator_type, last_message_id, last_message_content, last_message_time, create_time, update_time, status ) VALUES ( #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{creatorType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastMessageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastMessageContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastMessageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat SET name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creator_type = #{creatorType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_message_id = #{lastMessageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_message_content = #{lastMessageContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT cm2.member_name FROM chat_member cm2 WHERE cm2.chat_id = c.id AND NOT (cm2.member_id = #{userId} AND cm2.member_type = #{userType}) AND cm2.status = 0 LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.name END as name, c.type, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT cm2.avatar FROM chat_member cm2 WHERE cm2.chat_id = c.id AND NOT (cm2.member_id = #{userId} AND cm2.member_type = #{userType}) AND cm2.status = 0 LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.avatar END as avatar, c.creator_id, c.creator_type, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_content, c.last_message_time, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status FROM chat c JOIN chat_member cm ON c.id = cm.chat_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{userId} AND cm.member_type = #{userType} AND cm.status = 0 AND c.status = 0 AND c.last_message_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.last_message_time DESC

SELECT c.* FROM chat c JOIN chat_member cm1 ON c.id = cm1.chat_id JOIN chat_member cm2 ON c.id = cm2.chat_id AND cm1.id != cm2.id WHERE c.type = 1 AND c.status = 0 AND cm1.member_id = #{userId1} AND cm1.member_type = #{userType1} AND cm1.status = 0 AND cm2.member_id = #{userId2} AND cm2.member_type = #{userType2} AND cm2.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE chat SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_message_content = #{lastMessageContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{chatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
